title: Data Structures Basics
description: Understand primitive data structures, stacks, queues, and continuous layouts in system memory.
learningObjectives: Apply stacks and queues in game components like command histories or pathfinding

sections.title: Data Layout Structures
sections.content: Data structures organize data in memory. The simplest is the stack (Last-In, First-Out) used for undo histories or undoing player moves. The queue (First-In, First-Out) represents structures like network packet message flows or animation update queues.

sections.title: Basic Command Queue
